summary: Iteration 81: Tested expandable sales rows on Orders page. Backend: GET /api/orders/sales and /api/orders/purchases both return 200 with correct enriched data structure including new fields (pressing_variant, listing_price, description, listing_type, photo_urls, year). Frontend: Orders page loads correctly, both tabs (My Orders/My Sales) clickable and switch properly, empty states display correctly. Expandable row functionality tested with seed data - expand/collapse toggle works, detail section shows all enriched fields in grid layout, ShippingEditor and Cancel Order visible for sellers.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend _enrich_transactions correctly fetches and returns new listing fields (lines 810-821 in honeypot.py)
Frontend OrderRow component properly uses button wrapper for toggle functionality (line 137-196)
Frontend expanded detail section correctly renders all enriched fields conditionally (lines 200-308)
data-testid attributes properly implemented for all interactive elements
Photos displayed using horizontal scrollable gallery with AlbumArt component

seed_data_creation: Created temporary test listing and transaction for UI testing, then cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Expandable sales rows feature is complete and working. Test user (vinylcollector@honey.io) has no real sales/purchases, so empty states are shown by default. To test expandable functionality, create test transactions as documented in this iteration. The 404 console errors for image URLs are expected - the test images used fake discogs URLs.

mocked_integrations.email_sending: Resend email service is MOCKED - confirmation emails are logged but not sent
